name: drawerId
description: The ID the drawer element gets.

name: toggle
description: The CSS selector for the element that toggles the bottom drawer.

name: closeOnClick
description: Whether the bottom drawer should close when a child element is clicked.

name: title
description: The title of the bottom drawer.

name: registerClickHandler
description: Whether the component should register a click handler on the toggle element. Set this to false if you want to control the drawer programmatically and don't want the component to interfere with the toggle element.
